![](https://lib.msu.edu/themes/custom/msul_bootstrap5/images/Icons_Notice.svg)

**Notice:** Due to budget reductions, effective August 15, 2025, the MSU Libraries will no longer ship materials to addresses within a 50-mile radius of the MSU Main Library.  Faculty, staff, and students that live within 50 miles of the Main Library will need to pick up materials requested at the Main Library Circulation Desk, at the lockers in the north vestibule of the Main Library, or at the Gast Business Library. On-campus office delivery to faculty and staff will still be available.If you have any questions or feedback about this change, please contact Terri Miller, Associate Dean of Research and Operations, at [ticklet@msu.edu](mailto:ticklet@msu.edu "mailto:ticklet@msu.edu") or 517-884-0841.

Did you know the MSU Library holds the [largest comic book collection](https://comics.lib.msu.edu/) in the world?

This might be because:

- We’ve moved or renamed the page

- There’s a small typo in the web address

- The web address wasn’t copied/pasted fully

- The page no longer exists
